narrative:
Dayton City Sd city school district has 85,916 registered voters, with 62.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 21.2 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +6.5% D−R vs +30.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
